summary.en: Modern consolidates the entire IT function into one platform run by secure, always-on AI agents.
summary.zh: Modern 將整個 IT 部門整合到單一平台，由安全、全天候運作的 AI 代理人來執行。

highlight.en: It automates help desk, access, hardware, onboarding, security, and procurement end-to-end inside Slack, Teams, Email, Voice, WhatsApp, and Telegram.
highlight.zh: 它在 Slack、Teams、電子郵件、語音、WhatsApp 與 Telegram 中端到端自動化客服、權限、硬體、入職、安全與採購流程。

summary.en: ReasonBlocks is a runtime layer that makes AI agents cheaper and more reliable.
summary.zh: ReasonBlocks 是一個讓 AI 代理人更便宜、更可靠的執行時層。

highlight.en: It corrects agent reasoning and compresses tokens mid-run, reporting a 52% token reduction and 42% accuracy lift on SWE-Bench Pro.
highlight.zh: 它在執行中修正代理人的推理並壓縮 token，在 SWE-Bench Pro 上回報減少 52% token 並提升 42% 準確率。

summary.en: Hyper is a shared company brain that powers AI employees with a self-maintaining knowledge graph.
summary.zh: Hyper 是一個共享的公司大腦，以自我維護的知識圖譜為 AI 員工提供動力。

highlight.en: Its in-house memory system scores at or above SOTA on most public benchmarks, and within 12 days of launch it onboarded 50+ teams and reached 1k MRR.
highlight.zh: 其自研記憶系統在多數公開基準上達到或超越 SOTA，推出 12 天內就導入超過 50 個團隊並達到 1k MRR。

summary.en: Enjamb runs the entire drug program for biopharma teams, from discovery to FDA approval.
summary.zh: Enjamb 為生物製藥團隊運行整個藥物開發計畫，從探索到 FDA 核准。

highlight.en: Its agents work on top of existing systems like Benchling and Veeva with no migration, and within 3 weeks reached 500+ users at firms like J&J, AbbVie, and Merck.
highlight.zh: 其代理人在 Benchling、Veeva 等現有系統上運作且無需遷移，三週內就在 J&J、AbbVie、Merck 等公司獲得 500 多名使用者。

summary.en: Framewise Health turns medical records into personalized patient videos for onboarding, adherence, and recovery.
summary.zh: Framewise Health 將病歷轉化為個人化病患影片，用於入院引導、用藥遵從與康復。

highlight.en: The engagement data it collects builds an AI-native patient engagement platform for pharma, hospitals, medical devices, and private clinics.
highlight.zh: 它收集的互動數據建構出 AI 原生的病患互動平台，服務藥廠、醫院、醫療器材商與私人診所。

summary.en: Thomas is a YC-backed AI founder: a virtual human who starts, runs, and grows his own companies online.
summary.zh: Thomas 是一位 YC 投資的 AI 創辦人：一個在網路上創立、經營並擴張自己公司的虛擬人。

highlight.en: Built by a creator also named Thomas, it positions itself as the first AI founder operating businesses autonomously on the internet.
highlight.zh: 由同名創作者 Thomas 打造，它自詡為首位在網路上自主經營企業的 AI 創辦人。

summary.en: Huscarl is building an autonomous AI actuary that enables corporations to self-insure their risks.
summary.zh: Huscarl 正在打造一個自主的 AI 精算師，讓企業能夠自保其風險。

highlight.en: It provides the actuarial and modeling layer for corporate captive insurers, aiming to make self-insurance the default across the $1T corporate insurance market.
highlight.zh: 它為企業自保保險子公司（captive）提供精算與建模層，目標是讓自保成為價值 1 兆美元企業保險市場的常態。

summary.en: TakeCareOS is an AI-native operating system for long-term care providers.
summary.zh: TakeCareOS 是專為長期照護服務商打造的 AI 原生作業系統。

highlight.en: It consolidates the entire care lifecycle—scheduling, billing, documentation, compliance, and support—into one system driven by AI agents.
highlight.zh: 它將整個照護週期——排程、計費、文件、合規與客服——整合進一個由 AI 代理人驅動的系統。

summary.en: Standard Signal is a hedge fund where AI researches and executes every trade end-to-end.
summary.zh: Standard Signal 是一檔由 AI 端到端研究並執行每筆交易的避險基金。

highlight.en: Its custom models aim to discover and trade on new fundamental truths about the world before human analysts can.
highlight.zh: 其自研模型旨在比人類分析師更早發現關於世界的新基本面真相並據以交易。

summary.en: Zenbu is an extensible IDE for orchestrating coding agents around how your team works.
summary.zh: Zenbu 是一個可擴充的 IDE，用於依團隊工作方式來協調編碼代理人。

highlight.en: It lets developers shape the IDE around their exact workflow for coordinating multiple coding agents.
highlight.zh: 它讓開發者依自己精確的工作流程來塑造 IDE，以協調多個編碼代理人。

summary.en: The Company Company builds the agent and infrastructure to run companies.
summary.zh: The Company Company 打造用於經營公司的代理人與基礎設施。

highlight.en: It positions its agent as the last one a company will ever need to operate its business.
highlight.zh: 它將自家代理人定位為公司經營業務所需的最後一個代理人。

summary.en: Limrun extends cloud sandboxes with native dev tools like Xcode, iOS, and Android emulators.
summary.zh: Limrun 以 Xcode、iOS 與 Android 模擬器等原生開發工具擴充雲端沙盒。

highlight.en: Coding agents in the cloud lack native tools, so Limrun offers remote Xcode and simulators; Replit, Rork, and Quizlet's Coconote build and test mobile apps on it.
highlight.zh: 雲端編碼代理人缺乏原生工具，Limrun 提供遠端 Xcode 與模擬器；Replit、Rork 與 Quizlet 旗下的 Coconote 都用它建構與測試行動應用。

summary.en: Sidekick is an AI-powered SMS assistant for deskless frontline workers.
summary.zh: Sidekick 是一款為無固定座位的第一線工作者打造的 AI 簡訊助理。

highlight.en: Workers text questions in any language—or send photos and voice memos—to get instant answers from company documents, with no app or login on any phone.
highlight.zh: 工作者可用任何語言傳簡訊提問，或傳送照片與語音備忘，立即從公司文件取得解答，無需 App 或登入，任何手機皆可使用。

summary.en: Allowance is a spend control layer that lets AI agents make purchases without exposing your card.
summary.zh: Allowance 是一個支出控管層，讓 AI 代理人在不暴露你信用卡號的情況下進行消費。

highlight.en: Users approve purchases from their iPhone with spending limits and merchant restrictions, and Allowance issues scoped, one-time payment credentials per transaction.
highlight.zh: 使用者可在 iPhone 上以消費上限與商家限制批准交易，Allowance 為每筆交易簽發範圍受限的一次性付款憑證。

summary.en: smol machines lets developers ship software as portable, self-contained virtual machines.
summary.zh: smol machines 讓開發者以可攜、自包含的虛擬機形式交付軟體。

highlight.en: It solves "but it works on my machine" by shipping a lightweight VM with any software, similar to how Electron ships a browser with a web app.
highlight.zh: 它透過隨任何軟體一併交付輕量虛擬機來解決「在我電腦上明明可以跑」的問題，就像 Electron 隨網頁應用一併打包瀏覽器。

summary.en: Kuli is an AI coworker for marketing teams at the world's largest consumer brands.
summary.zh: Kuli 是一位為全球最大消費品牌行銷團隊服務的 AI 同事。

highlight.en: Unlike databases and CRMs, Kuli's agent actually watches social videos to scout creators and analyze trends; teams at Disney, Nivea, and PostHog use it.
highlight.zh: 有別於資料庫與 CRM，Kuli 的代理人會真正觀看社群影片來發掘創作者並分析趨勢；Disney、Nivea 與 PostHog 的團隊都在使用。

summary.en: Pops lets people create, play, remix, and share AI games with friends.
summary.zh: Pops 讓人們與朋友一起創作、遊玩、改編並分享 AI 遊戲。

highlight.en: Every play turns into a shareable gameplay video, and creators can build or remix a playable game in seconds without code or game engines.
highlight.zh: 每次遊玩都會變成可分享的遊戲影片，創作者無需程式碼或遊戲引擎，數秒內就能建立或改編可遊玩的遊戲。

summary.en: Pentagon is a workspace where AI employees communicate, coordinate, and get work done as a team.
summary.zh: Pentagon 是一個工作空間，讓 AI 員工像團隊一樣溝通、協調並完成工作。

highlight.en: It serves as the control plane for agent-native work, helping AI employees collaborate as a coordinated team.
highlight.zh: 它作為代理人原生工作的控制平面，協助 AI 員工以協調的團隊方式協作。

summary.en: Lattice Health monitors deployed medical imaging AI so hospitals know each model still works.
summary.zh: Lattice Health 監控已部署的醫療影像 AI，讓醫院能掌握每個模型是否仍正常運作。

highlight.en: It tracks agreement with radiologist reads, drift, and performance across patient groups, observing rather than controlling to produce safety and compliance evidence.
highlight.zh: 它追蹤與放射科醫師判讀的一致性、模型漂移與跨病患族群的表現，以觀察而非控制的方式產出安全與合規佐證。

summary.en: Clawvisor is an authorization layer that lets AI agents use apps without seeing your credentials.
summary.zh: Clawvisor 是一個授權層，讓 AI 代理人在看不到你憑證的情況下使用各種應用程式。

highlight.en: Users approve tasks once, and Clawvisor enforces them on every request so agents can use Gmail, Slack, and Google Drive without going rogue.
highlight.zh: 使用者只需批准任務一次，Clawvisor 便在每次請求時強制執行，讓代理人能使用 Gmail、Slack 與 Google Drive 而不致失控。

summary.en: Totalis is building a derivatives layer for prediction markets.
summary.zh: Totalis 正在為預測市場打造衍生性商品層。

highlight.en: It focuses on building financial derivative products on top of prediction markets.
highlight.zh: 它專注於在預測市場之上建構金融衍生性商品。

summary.en: Incandor detects fraud by learning how each user physically behaves on a platform.
summary.zh: Incandor 透過學習每位使用者在平台上的實際行為來偵測詐欺。

highlight.en: Using mouse, keystroke, scroll, and phone-holding signals, it identifies account takeovers with >99% accuracy and surfaces coordinated rings—no fraud labels needed.
highlight.zh: 它運用滑鼠、按鍵、捲動與持機方式等訊號，以超過 99% 準確率辨識帳戶盜用並揭露協同詐騙團夥，無需詐欺標註資料。

summary.en: GovGuard builds AI agents that automate government workflows, starting with FOIA requests.
summary.zh: GovGuard 打造自動化政府工作流程的 AI 代理人，從資訊公開（FOIA）申請開始。

highlight.en: Public records teams still redact line by line and risk lawsuits for missing legal deadlines; GovGuard automates searching for records and applying redactions.
highlight.zh: 公共紀錄團隊仍逐行塗改、且可能因錯過法定期限而被告；GovGuard 自動化記錄搜尋與遮蔽作業。

summary.en: Wealor is an AI-native platform for wealth managers.
summary.zh: Wealor 是一個專為財富管理顧問打造的 AI 原生平台。

highlight.en: It brings AI-native tooling to the workflows of wealth management professionals.
highlight.zh: 它將 AI 原生工具帶入財富管理專業人員的工作流程。

summary.en: Pavoot is an AI event manager for companies that run in-person customer events.
summary.zh: Pavoot 是為舉辦實體客戶活動的公司打造的 AI 活動經理。

highlight.en: It replaces fragmented notes, emails, and spreadsheets with one system that keeps every attendee, conversation, and follow-up connected to make relationship-driven growth scalable.
highlight.zh: 它以單一系統取代零散的筆記、郵件與試算表，將每位與會者、對話與後續跟進串連起來，讓以關係驅動的成長得以規模化。

summary.en: Walter is an AI employee for manufacturing operations.
summary.zh: Walter 是一位用於製造營運的 AI 員工。

highlight.en: It applies an AI-employee model directly to the operational workflows of manufacturing.
highlight.zh: 它將 AI 員工模式直接應用於製造業的營運工作流程。

summary.en: BioStack builds real-world training environments and data pipelines for healthcare AI models.
summary.zh: BioStack 為醫療 AI 模型打造真實世界的訓練環境與資料管線。

highlight.en: It structures longitudinal multimodal data across imaging, EHR, and assays into ML-ready training environments, since the bottleneck is data access, not models.
highlight.zh: 由於瓶頸在於資料取得而非模型，它將跨影像、電子病歷與檢驗的縱向多模態資料結構化為可用於機器學習的訓練環境。

summary.en: Plena is an AI operating system that automates administrative workflows for specialty medical practices.
summary.zh: Plena 是一個自動化專科醫療診所行政流程的 AI 作業系統。

highlight.en: It automates referrals, fax intake, scheduling, compliance, and collections end to end, growing 17x in 10 months to seven figures in committed ARR across six specialties.
highlight.zh: 它端到端自動化轉診、傳真接收、排程、合規與催收，10 個月內成長 17 倍，在六個專科達到七位數的承諾 ARR。

summary.en: General Aviation aims to fix air traffic control by connecting aircraft to the internet.
summary.zh: General Aviation 旨在透過讓飛機連上網路來修復空中交通管制。

highlight.en: It is building the elements of a new air traffic control system based on connecting aircraft to the internet.
highlight.zh: 它正以讓飛機連上網路為基礎，建構新一代空中交通管制系統的各個元件。

summary.en: Apollo Atomics makes the most compact nuclear reactors.
summary.zh: Apollo Atomics 製造最為小型化的核子反應爐。

highlight.en: Its focus is engineering nuclear reactors at the most compact scale possible.
highlight.zh: 其專注於以最小化的尺度設計核子反應爐。

summary.en: HeyClicky is a simple AI interface that sits by your cursor and spawns agents on command.
summary.zh: HeyClicky 是一個簡潔的 AI 介面，停駐在游標旁並依指令喚出代理人。

highlight.en: It sees your screen so you can ask a question aloud to be walked through a task, or say "HeyClicky Agent" to spin up an agent that works in the background.
highlight.zh: 它能看見你的螢幕，讓你出聲提問以獲得逐步指引，或說「HeyClicky Agent」就能在背景啟動代理人替你工作。

summary.en: Isengard Industries mass-produces AI strike systems and counter-UAS for allied nations.
summary.zh: Isengard Industries 為盟國大量生產 AI 打擊系統與反無人機系統。

highlight.en: It calls its approach "Weapons of Mass Production"—giving allied nations the means to make precision-strike and counter-drone systems by the thousand on their own soil.
highlight.zh: 它將其方法稱為「大規模生產武器」，讓盟國能在自己國土上以數千計地製造精準打擊與反無人機系統。

summary.en: Care GP builds AI agents to run operations for primary healthcare clinics.
summary.zh: Care GP 打造 AI 代理人來經營基層醫療診所的營運。

highlight.en: It focuses AI agents specifically on running the operational side of primary healthcare clinics.
highlight.zh: 它將 AI 代理人專門用於經營基層醫療診所的營運面。

summary.en: Hop Aero builds rocket cargo vehicles that deliver to contested environments in minutes.
summary.zh: Hop Aero 打造火箭貨運載具，可在數分鐘內向爭議環境投送貨物。

highlight.en: Its rockets fly point-to-point at hypersonic speeds into the most austere locations, aiming to give the U.S. and allies a deterrent advantage.
highlight.zh: 其火箭以高超音速點對點飛抵最嚴苛的地點，目標是為美國及盟國提供具嚇阻力的優勢。

summary.en: Pango is an autonomous digital employee that runs back-office operations for e-commerce companies.
summary.zh: Pango 是一位自主的數位員工，為電商公司運行後台營運。

highlight.en: Its agentic OS handles deliveries, tracking, returns, transport, and customer service for e-commerce operations.
highlight.zh: 其代理人作業系統為電商營運處理配送、追蹤、退貨、運輸與客服。

summary.en: Talentpluto builds voice agents that understand and represent people's careers to employers.
summary.zh: Talentpluto 打造語音代理人，理解並向雇主代表人們的職涯。

highlight.en: Its agent Pluto has voice conversations about a person's work and goals; over 15,000 people have completed conversations and it grows 30% month over month.
highlight.zh: 其代理人 Pluto 透過語音對話了解一個人的工作與目標；已有超過 15,000 人完成對話，並以每月 30% 的速度成長。

summary.en: Baud builds novel AI training chips and a developer platform for frontier models.
summary.zh: Baud 打造新型 AI 訓練晶片與用於前沿模型的開發者平台。

highlight.en: Built from first principles, its hardware aims to let companies train, fine-tune, and deploy frontier models with orders of magnitude better performance than incumbents.
highlight.zh: 其硬體從第一性原理出發，目標是讓公司以比現有業者高出數個數量級的效能來訓練、微調與部署前沿模型。

summary.en: Shepherd ingests every tool your team uses into one unified company memory, accessible by text.
summary.zh: Shepherd 將團隊使用的每個工具匯入一個統一的公司記憶，只需傳訊即可存取。

highlight.en: It automatically builds a unified memory your team can index and your agents can act on, reachable with a single text.
highlight.zh: 它自動建構一個統一記憶，供團隊建立索引、供代理人據以行動，只需一則訊息即可觸及。

summary.en: Atlas Discovery is mapping the atlas of disease biology using virtual cells.
summary.zh: Atlas Discovery 運用虛擬細胞繪製疾病生物學的圖譜。

highlight.en: It uses virtual cells to discover and map the underlying biology of disease.
highlight.zh: 它運用虛擬細胞來探索並繪製疾病背後的生物學機制。

summary.en: RealPact is an AI-native OS that handles the paperwork behind real estate transactions.
summary.zh: RealPact 是一個 AI 原生作業系統，處理房地產交易背後的文書作業。

highlight.en: Its agents find property records like deeds and permits, then fill contracts, organize documents, and track deadlines; it sells to brokerages in New Hampshire.
highlight.zh: 其代理人尋找契據、許可等不動產紀錄，再填寫合約、整理文件並追蹤期限；目前向新罕布夏州的仲介行銷售。

summary.en: Dialogus builds infrastructure to deploy production-grade voice agents for enterprises.
summary.zh: Dialogus 打造基礎設施，為企業部署可上線運作的語音代理人。

highlight.en: While many can demo a voice agent, Dialogus connects them to phone systems, CRMs, databases, and escalation flows so they complete real workflows, not just talk.
highlight.zh: 雖然許多人能展示語音代理人，Dialogus 卻將其連接至電話系統、CRM、資料庫與升級流程，讓它們完成真實工作流程而不只是對話。

summary.en: Cerenovus is a company brain that aggregates every file into one AI-readable knowledge graph.
summary.zh: Cerenovus 是一個公司大腦，將每一種檔案彙整成一個 AI 可讀的知識圖譜。

highlight.en: It maps the company as a system across people, processes, and tools, then infers where operations are inefficient to help executives make evidence-backed decisions.
highlight.zh: 它將公司視為一個系統，串連人員、流程與工具，再推斷營運低效之處，協助主管做出有憑有據的決策。

summary.en: Florin is a financial operating system that brings banking, payments, cards, and treasury into one account for startups.
summary.zh: Florin 是一個金融作業系統，為新創公司將銀行、支付、卡片與資金管理整合至單一帳戶。

highlight.en: Rather than reselling another bank's rails, it builds the infrastructure end to end so money moves in real time on a single owned ledger, starting with venture-backed companies.
highlight.zh: 它不轉售他行的金流軌道，而是端到端自建基礎設施，讓資金在自有的單一帳本上即時流動，並從創投支持的公司起步。

summary.en: Prescience is a health benefits platform that trains AI to create, operate, and insure employer health plans.
summary.zh: Prescience 是一個健康福利平台，訓練 AI 來建立、營運並承保雇主健康計畫。

highlight.en: It says it saves employers 20-50% on healthcare, using an AlphaGo-like "Time Machine" system to steer patients toward cost-saving health trajectories.
highlight.zh: 它表示能為雇主節省 20-50% 的醫療支出，並以類似 AlphaGo 的「時光機」系統引導病患走向可省成本的健康軌跡。

summary.en: Archal is an eval platform that tests agents touching third-party APIs without hitting real services.
summary.zh: Archal 是一個評測平台，可在不觸及真實服務的情況下測試使用第三方 API 的代理人。

highlight.en: It builds working clones of popular SaaS platforms that hold state and behave like the originals, so you catch bugs before an agent does something irreversible in production.
highlight.zh: 它建構熱門 SaaS 平台的可運作複本，能保留狀態並如原版般運作，讓你在代理人於正式環境造成不可逆操作前就抓出錯誤。

summary.en: Tsenta matches you with jobs, optimizes your profile, and applies on your behalf.
summary.zh: Tsenta 為你媒合工作、優化你的個人檔案，並代你投遞申請。

highlight.en: Built after the founders applied to 3,000+ jobs manually, it offers a web app, iMessage bot, MCP, and Chrome extension to control every application submitted.
highlight.zh: 創辦人在手動投遞 3,000 多份工作後打造了它，提供網頁應用、iMessage 機器人、MCP 與 Chrome 擴充功能，讓你掌控每一筆送出的申請。

summary.en: Control Seat provides control and monitoring of industrial operations.
summary.zh: Control Seat 提供工業營運的控制與監測。

highlight.en: It focuses on the control and monitoring layer for industrial operations.
highlight.zh: 它專注於工業營運的控制與監測層。

summary.en: Cova is an AI-native home care agency licensed in Michigan whose operations run on AI agents.
summary.zh: Cova 是一家在密西根州取得執照的 AI 原生居家照護機構，營運全由 AI 代理人驅動。

highlight.en: It serves Medicaid, LTCI, and private-pay patients, pays caregivers the state's highest base rate, and helps family caregivers get paid through programs they didn't know they qualified for.
highlight.zh: 它服務 Medicaid、長照保險與自費病患，支付照護者全州最高的基本費率，並協助家庭照護者透過他們不知自己符合資格的方案領取報酬。

summary.en: Poth is an agentic research platform that helps companies understand why users behave as they do.
summary.zh: Poth 是一個代理人研究平台，協助公司理解使用者為何如此行為。

highlight.en: It connects to company data, forms hypotheses about what might be causing problems, and validates them using existing data and adaptive user feedback.
highlight.zh: 它連接公司資料，對問題的可能成因提出假設，再以既有資料與自適應的使用者回饋加以驗證。

summary.en: Osmaura is an AI growth engine that helps law firm partners find and win new matters.
summary.zh: Osmaura 是一個 AI 成長引擎，協助律師事務所合夥人發掘並贏得新案件。

highlight.en: After interviewing 100+ partners, it monitors the web, news, socials, and firm CRM to surface targeted opportunities, giving every partner rainmaker-level support.
highlight.zh: 在訪談超過 100 位合夥人後，它監控網路、新聞、社群與事務所 CRM 以找出精準商機，讓每位合夥人都獲得頂尖業務級的支援。

summary.en: Blueprints is an agentic harness for financial markets.
summary.zh: Blueprints 是一個用於金融市場的代理人框架。

highlight.en: It provides an agentic framework built specifically for operating in financial markets.
highlight.zh: 它提供一個專為在金融市場運作而打造的代理人框架。

summary.en: Perceptron ML is an event-driven AI engine that turns real-world signals into action.
summary.zh: Perceptron ML 是一個事件驅動的 AI 引擎，將真實世界的訊號轉化為行動。

highlight.en: It first helps law firms discover new legal matters the moment they break and launch campaigns within hours, all under human approval.
highlight.zh: 它首先協助律師事務所在新法律案件爆發的瞬間發掘並於數小時內發動行動，全程經人類批准。

summary.en: Rex is an AI-native service that replaces people-heavy order-to-cash operations with agents.
summary.zh: Rex 是一個 AI 原生服務，以代理人取代仰賴大量人力的「訂單到收款」營運。

highlight.en: Its agents continuously manage invoices, customers, and exceptions; it is live with pre-IPO companies managing over $500M in receivables from F100 firms.
highlight.zh: 其代理人持續管理發票、客戶與例外情況；它已與上市前公司合作，管理來自財星百大企業逾 5 億美元的應收帳款。

summary.en: Insurf is an AI-native data and decision layer for health insurance.
summary.zh: Insurf 是一個為健康保險打造的 AI 原生資料與決策層。

highlight.en: Its first product, Inveto, turns denied claims into source-cited, physician-attested appeals, while building a coverage-decision graph that powers health-plan pricing.
highlight.zh: 其首項產品 Inveto 將遭拒理賠轉化為附引用來源、由醫師背書的申訴，同時建構承保決策圖譜以驅動健康計畫的定價。

summary.en: GUILD is a neoprime contractor automating the defense supply chain end-to-end.
summary.zh: GUILD 是一家「新主承包商」，端到端自動化國防供應鏈。

highlight.en: It vertically integrates with supplier partners and combines AI, contracting operations, and capital to source, fund, produce, and deliver defense contracts across U.S. and NATO markets.
highlight.zh: 它與供應商夥伴垂直整合，結合 AI、合約營運與資本，在美國與北約市場端到端尋源、融資、生產並交付國防合約。

summary.en: Truffle is an AI-native operating system for the restaurant and hospitality back-of-house.
summary.zh: Truffle 是一個 AI 原生作業系統，服務餐廳與餐旅業的後場。

highlight.en: Computer vision and voice AI capture inventory 90% faster than manual counts, ML forecasts demand at 97% accuracy, and agents run procurement, scheduling, and prep autonomously.
highlight.zh: 電腦視覺與語音 AI 盤點庫存比人工快 90%，機器學習以 97% 準確率預測需求，代理人自主運行採購、排班與備料。

summary.en: Touchmark prices AI by the value it delivers.
summary.zh: Touchmark 依 AI 所交付的價值來定價。

highlight.en: It focuses on value-based pricing for AI, charging by the value delivered rather than by usage.
highlight.zh: 它專注於 AI 的價值導向定價，依交付的價值而非用量來收費。

summary.en: FlowManual is an all-in-one AI platform for construction's back office.
summary.zh: FlowManual 是一個一站式 AI 平台，服務營建業的後勤辦公室。

highlight.en: Built by two engineers and Harvard dropouts, it cuts manual and repetitive tasks so contractors can win more work and deliver at a higher standard.
highlight.zh: 由兩位工程師暨哈佛輟學生打造，它削減手動與重複性工作，讓承包商能贏得更多案件並以更高標準交付。

summary.en: Whitespace is an AI operating system for wholesale distributors.
summary.zh: Whitespace 是一個為批發配銷商打造的 AI 作業系統。

highlight.en: It connects to systems and inboxes to build a living model of the business, then deploys self-improving agents for inventory planning, support, and order entry.
highlight.zh: 它連接系統與收件匣以建構企業的動態模型，再部署能自我改進的代理人來處理庫存規劃、客服與訂單輸入。

summary.en: LATO is an agent-native research and simulation platform for investors.
summary.zh: LATO 是一個為投資人打造的代理人原生研究與模擬平台。

highlight.en: It does end-to-end market research—combining public data, the fund's knowledge, and first-hand interviews—to ground a simulation predicting how market participants behave.
highlight.zh: 它執行端到端的市場研究，結合公開資料、基金自有知識與第一手訪談，據以建立模擬以預測市場參與者的行為。

summary.en: Markov sources high-quality tasks and data to train computer-use AI models.
summary.zh: Markov 蒐集高品質的任務與資料，用於訓練電腦操作型 AI 模型。

highlight.en: It focuses on producing the high-quality task and training data needed for the next generation of computer-use AI.
highlight.zh: 它專注於產出下一代電腦操作型 AI 所需的高品質任務與訓練資料。

summary.en: Levocred AI is a company brain and AI employee for credit teams.
summary.zh: Levocred AI 是一個為信貸團隊打造的公司大腦與 AI 員工。

highlight.en: It plugs into a fund's loan tape, credit agreements, servicer reports, and bank feeds to run the workflows analysts would otherwise grind on.
highlight.zh: 它接入基金的貸款明細、信貸協議、服務商報告與銀行資料流，運行分析師原本得辛苦處理的工作流程。

summary.en: Mireye is infrastructure that gives AI agents reliable understanding of the physical world.
summary.zh: Mireye 是一套基礎設施，讓 AI 代理人能可靠地理解實體世界。

highlight.en: Geospatial data is fragmented and unstructured, so its API and MCP give agents cited answers about any location, aiming to index every inch of the earth.
highlight.zh: 地理空間資料零散且非結構化，其 API 與 MCP 為代理人提供關於任何地點且附引用的解答，目標是索引地球的每一吋。

summary.en: Coasty is a computer-use agent that does real work inside the software companies already run.
summary.zh: Coasty 是一個電腦操作代理人，在公司既有的軟體中完成真實工作。

highlight.en: Unlike agents that break on real software, Coasty reads the screen instead of recording clicks, catches when it goes off track, fixes itself mid-task, and leaves a replayable trail.
highlight.zh: 有別於遇到真實軟體就崩潰的代理人，Coasty 讀取畫面而非錄製點擊，能察覺自己偏離軌道、於任務中途自我修正，並留下可重播的軌跡。

summary.en: Experiential Labs is an applied AI research lab building world models for AI agents.
summary.zh: Experiential Labs 是一個應用 AI 研究實驗室，為 AI 代理人打造世界模型。

highlight.en: Using technology from self-driving to reach 99.7% reconstruction fidelity, its first use case automates creating and running agent evals from telemetry traces.
highlight.zh: 它運用自駕技術達到 99.7% 的重建保真度，首個應用是依遙測軌跡自動化建立並執行代理人評測。

summary.en: Parasma writes the algorithms to turn human brain cells into compute for AI.
summary.zh: Parasma 撰寫演算法，將人類腦細胞轉化為 AI 的運算能力。

highlight.en: It focuses on training human brain cells and developing the algorithms to use them as compute.
highlight.zh: 它專注於訓練人類腦細胞，並開發將其作為運算資源的演算法。

summary.en: Glen provides unified organizational context for every agent and human on your team.
summary.zh: Glen 為團隊中的每個代理人與每個人提供統一的組織情境。

highlight.en: Instead of handing agents a single slice, it reads from code, PRs, issues, docs, and meetings, reconciles them, and gives agents the full picture, then distills work into reusable skills.
highlight.zh: 它不只給代理人單一片段，而是讀取程式碼、PR、議題、文件與會議並加以彙整，給代理人完整全貌，並將工作提煉為可重複使用的技能。

summary.en: Context.dev gives AI agents realtime web context at scale through a single API.
summary.zh: Context.dev 透過單一 API 為 AI 代理人大規模提供即時的網路情境。

highlight.en: It helps developers build agents that depend on accurate, fresh structured web data, and already powers agentic products at Mintlify, Klarna, and 250 other companies.
highlight.zh: 它協助開發者打造仰賴準確、即時結構化網路資料的代理人，並已為 Mintlify、Klarna 等 250 多家公司的代理人產品提供動力。

summary.en: Codag does systems log compression for AI agents.
summary.zh: Codag 為 AI 代理人進行系統日誌壓縮。

highlight.en: It focuses on compressing systems logs so AI agents can work with them more efficiently.
highlight.zh: 它專注於壓縮系統日誌，讓 AI 代理人能更有效率地處理。

summary.en: machine0 is a CLI for creating, provisioning, and snapshotting persistent cloud VMs for agents.
summary.zh: machine0 是一個 CLI，用於為代理人建立、佈建並快照持久的雲端虛擬機。

highlight.en: `machine0 new` spins up a VM with dedicated CPU, GPUs, a static IP, and pre-installed tools and agents like Claude Code, backed by a 99.99% uptime SLA across four regions.
highlight.zh: `machine0 new` 啟動一台配有專屬 CPU、GPU、靜態 IP 及預裝工具與 Claude Code 等代理人的虛擬機，並提供橫跨四個區域 99.99% 的可用性 SLA。

summary.en: Bloomy uses AI to deliver adaptive, mastery-based learning for K-12 students.
summary.zh: Bloomy 運用 AI 為 K-12 學生提供自適應、以精熟為本的學習。

highlight.en: Its AI identifies exactly what a student should learn and when, providing a personalized curriculum starting with English Language Arts and Math.
highlight.zh: 其 AI 精準找出學生該學什麼、何時學，並提供個人化課程，從英語文與數學起步。

summary.en: Denta is a practice management platform that puts dental practices on autopilot.
summary.zh: Denta 是一個診所管理平台，讓牙科診所進入自動駕駛模式。

highlight.en: Built to help operate the founder's father's 10 Iowa practices, it standardizes fragmented data; launched two weeks ago with $3,000 monthly revenue and 60 practices piloting.
highlight.zh: 它最初是為協助經營創辦人父親在愛荷華州的 10 家診所而打造，將零散資料標準化；兩週前推出，月營收 3,000 美元，並有 60 家診所試用。

summary.en: 6thSense is building a nervous system for physical AI.
summary.zh: 6thSense 正在為實體 AI 打造一套神經系統。

highlight.en: It focuses on the sensing and nervous-system layer that physical AI needs to perceive and act.
highlight.zh: 它專注於實體 AI 感知與行動所需的感測與神經系統層。

summary.en: Operon is an agentic data intelligence layer for manufacturing and heavy process industries.
summary.zh: Operon 是一個為製造業與重型製程產業打造的代理人資料智慧層。

highlight.en: It ingests the messy documents a plant runs on—P&IDs, schematics, datasheets, scans—into one structured model engineers can query in natural language and build agentic workflows on.
highlight.zh: 它將工廠賴以運作的雜亂文件——管線儀表圖、示意圖、規格表、掃描檔——匯入單一結構化模型，讓工程師以自然語言查詢並建構代理人工作流程。

summary.en: Agentcard issues debit cards that let AI agents pay for things online autonomously.
summary.zh: Agentcard 發行金融簽帳卡，讓 AI 代理人能自主在線上付款。

highlight.en: Agents use its API to issue cards and pay for things online without human intervention.
highlight.zh: 代理人透過其 API 發卡並在線上付款，無需人為介入。

summary.en: Simantic provides firmware and hardware simulation for AI agents and engineers.
summary.zh: Simantic 為 AI 代理人與工程師提供韌體與硬體模擬。

highlight.en: It modernizes embedded firmware development by giving both humans and AI visibility into hardware previously limited by the physical world.
highlight.zh: 它現代化嵌入式韌體開發，讓人類與 AI 都能看見過去受實體世界限制而難以掌握的硬體。

summary.en: GodHands is a deterministic computer-use layer that lets AI agents reliably operate apps.
summary.zh: GodHands 是一個確定性的電腦操作層，讓 AI 代理人能可靠地操作應用程式。

highlight.en: It makes workflows on legacy or non-API systems more predictable without relying on fragile vision-based approaches, so agents work across enterprise apps with no custom integrations.
highlight.zh: 它讓在舊系統或無 API 系統上的工作流程更可預測，而不依賴脆弱的視覺式方法，使代理人無需客製整合即可跨企業應用運作。

summary.en: Degla turns natural language into autonomous multi-drone mission execution.
summary.zh: Degla 將自然語言轉化為自主的多無人機任務執行。

highlight.en: Once you state your intent, the system owns the problem—planning the mission and handling failures so you never babysit drones or rewrite plans.
highlight.zh: 一旦你表達意圖，系統就接手整個問題——規劃任務並處理失誤，讓你無須照看無人機或重寫計畫。

summary.en: RightNow AI builds GPU infrastructure that lets teams own their AI stack instead of depending on closed APIs.
summary.zh: RightNow AI 打造 GPU 基礎設施，讓團隊能擁有自己的 AI 技術堆疊，而非仰賴封閉的 API。

highlight.en: Its RunInfra platform takes any HuggingFace model, auto-generates optimized GPU kernels, and deploys it serverlessly with pay-per-token pricing.
highlight.zh: 其 RunInfra 平台可接收任何 HuggingFace 模型，自動生成優化的 GPU 核心，並以無伺服器、按 token 計費的方式部署。

summary.en: Rote is an AI-native insurance department for auto body shops that recovers denied claims.
summary.zh: Rote 是一個為汽車鈑金廠打造的 AI 原生保險部門，協助追回遭拒的理賠。

highlight.en: Its agents take shop estimates, reference technical repair data, and autonomously file and defend claims against insurers that undervalue repair costs.
highlight.zh: 其代理人取用車廠估價、參照技術維修資料，並自主對低估維修成本的保險公司提出並捍衛理賠。

summary.en: Y Combinator's guiding principle is to make something people want.
summary.zh: Y Combinator 的核心理念是：做出人們真正想要的東西。

highlight.en: Its enduring mantra, "make something people want," captures its core advice to founders.
highlight.zh: 其歷久不衰的箴言「做出人們想要的東西」，濃縮了它給創辦人的核心建議。
